case_title: ANTONIO MERLIN PEREZ VS. ALEXANDER B GREENBERG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,700.00 FILED BY PEREZ, ANTONIO MERLIN AS TO DEFENDANT GREENBERG, ALEXANDER B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED APR-01-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREENBERG, ALEXANDER B

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-16-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, ANTONIO MERLIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENBERG, ALEXANDER B $4,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,870.00, PLAINTIFF MAY ALSO KEEP THE CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER - SENT TO DEFENDANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD.

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 05/27/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ANTONIO MERLIN PEREZ, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER MANTI HENRIQUEZ IS PRESENT. WITNESS JOSUE GONGORA TESTIFIES ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER B. GREENBERG IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVEIWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506
